claimText: The University of Sydney Academic Integrity Policy 2022 states students may only use assistance, including automated writing tools, if the unit of study outline expressly permits it, and must acknowledge assistance provided when preparing submitted work.

citation.citationTitle: Frequently asked questions about generative AI at Sydney
